## ✅ Checklist
Please ensure the following before submitting this PR:

- [ ] Code compiles without warnings or errors  
- [ ] Feature is covered by tests (unit/integration/e2e if applicable)  
- [ ] All existing tests pass  
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, wiki, or inline comments)  
- [ ] No hard-coded values, secrets, or credentials  
- [ ] Code follows project style guide / linters  
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and meaningful  
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed (no unnecessary packages added)  
- [ ] No major performance regressions  
- [ ] Feature has been tested in different environments (if applicable)  
- [ ] Team/Reviewer notified of potential breaking changes  

---
